name: Canada Trust Financial Services Inc.
description: Canada Trust Financial Services Inc., formerly known as Canada Trustco Mortgage Company, was a major Canadian trust company and financial services provider. Headquartered in London, Ontario, the company offered a wide range of retail banking, mortgage, and trust services across Canada. In 2000, the company was acquired by the Toronto-Dominion Bank for $8 billion, leading to the integration of their retail banking operations under the brand name TD Canada Trust.
